case_title: LOWELL WILLIAMS VS. LORRYE C WILLIAMS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAY-16-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LORRYE C

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF LOWELL WILLIAMS (BROTHER) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LORRYE C WILLIAMS (SISTER) IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS LOREN SMITH. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2023 - JUDGMENT.
